# Ignacio Vivar (Nacho) - Full Stack Developer Portfolio

> Profile and project index of Ignacio Vivar, Full-Stack Developer and Electronic Engineer specialized in FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Supabase.

## Profile Summary

- **Name:** Ignacio Vivar (Nacho)
- **Role:** Full-Stack Developer & Electronic Engineer
- **Core Stack:** FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Vite, React, Docker, Supabase
- **Characteristics:** Native Spanish Speaker, Argentinian, English Working Proficiency, Tech Enthusiast
- **GitHub:** [github.com/ignacio-vivar](https://github.com/ignacio-vivar)
- **Email:** ignacio.vivar.cruz@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/ignacio-vivar-cruz](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ignacio-vivar-cruz/)

---

## Projects

Detailed catalog of developed systems, APIs, integrations, and architectural decisions.

### [GimTest](https://gim-project.vercel.app) (Status: Live | Role: Solo Project | 2024 — Present)
Full-stack gym management SaaS for managing exercises, routines, student progress, schedules, and automated sessions.
- **Stack:** Next.js, FastAPI, Supabase, PostgreSQL, shadcn/ui, TanStack Table
- **Core Architecture:** Multi-tab Single Page Application (SPA) utilizing a FastAPI backend and a Next.js client, with Supabase handling database operations and authentication.
- **Technical Highlights:**
  - Integrated APScheduler for automated session status transitions in the FastAPI backend.
  - Implemented PostgreSQL Row-Level Security (RLS) coupled with Security Definer database functions to enforce tenant data isolation.
  - Set up automated Supabase database triggers for role-based user management.
  - Integrated TanStack Table for high-performance sorting, filtering, and pagination of student datasets.
  - Developed custom schedule templates supporting flexible, per-day configuration profiles.
- **Key Challenges Resolved:**
  - Integrated Supabase Authentication with middleware state sync in Next.js.
  - Fixed Docker port mapping and WSL2 service port conflicts.
  - Mapped PostgreSQL `ARRAY(TIME)` type dynamically in SQLAlchemy ORM.

### [CDF Vivar](https://cdf-vivar.vercel.app) (Status: Live | Role: Solo Project)
A high-performance educational portal for content sharing and material previews.
- **Stack:** Astro, MDX, Google Drive, Vercel, Antigravity
- **Core Architecture:** Lightweight static site (SSG) utilizing Astro and MDX, pulling download assets directly from Google Drive. Created as a fast, low-friction alternative to a traditional Moodle LMS.
- **Technical Highlights:**
  - Fully static, SEO-optimized page rendering for high speed and minimal loading times.
  - MDX file processing pipeline allowing JSX component embeds inside standard Markdown files.
  - AI-assisted development workflow via Antigravity.
- **Key Challenges Resolved:**
  - Successfully resolved complex package manager dependencies and version resolution issues manually during agentic builds.

### [CDF — CNC Platform](https://cncwebpage.netlify.app/) (Status: Live | Role: Solo Project)
Educational platform for CNC programming resource sharing and file downloads.
- **Stack:** React, FastAPI, Figma
- **Core Architecture:** Multi-repo project featuring a React frontend and a FastAPI backend, designed in Figma prior to development.
- **Key Insights & Anti-Patterns Documented:**
  - Direct file streaming from backend server disk. Served as a learning experience regarding static file scaling bottlenecks and the necessity of object storage buckets (e.g. AWS S3) and Content Delivery Networks (CDNs).

### [Nutrition Bot](https://github.com/ignacio-vivar/bot_telegram) (Status: Running | Role: Solo Project)
Telegram bot for automated personal nutrition tracking and calorie logging.
- **Stack:** Python, Telegram Bot API, FatSecret API, FastAPI, VPS
- **Core Architecture:** Python service integrating the Telegram Bot API with the FatSecret API, deployed on a self-managed Contabo VPS.
- **Technical Highlights:**
  - Implemented single-user authentication gating based on Telegram Chat IDs.
  - Integrated a fuzzy matching library for string similarity searches across the FatSecret food database.
  - VPS deployment with process monitoring for 24/7 uptime.
- **Key Challenges Resolved:**
  - Programmed 3-legged OAuth authentication token exchange to query user data from the restricted FatSecret API.
  - Parsed and cached custom nutrition schemas into JSON files.

### Docs Mobile (Status: Archived | Role: Co-Developer)
Mobile-first document cataloging system designed for medical teams.
- **Stack:** React, FastAPI, JWT Auth, Mobile-first, shadcn/ui, Notion
- **Core Architecture:** Multi-developer React/FastAPI mobile app implementing a custom JSON Web Token (JWT) verification and cookie handling flow without third-party auth providers.
- **Technical Highlights:**
  - Constructed accessible and responsive component patterns using shadcn/ui.
- **Key Learnings:**
  - Faced maintenance overhead and infrastructure/hosting costs that led to project archival. Refined reusable React custom hooks and component separation practices.

### [Proposite](https://github.com/ignacio-vivar/proposite-project-student-frontend) (Status: Archived | Role: Solo Project)
A dual-dashboard grade tracking and feedback prototype built to learn TanStack Table and custom JWT authentication.
- **Stack:** React, TanStack Table, FastAPI, Manual Auth
- **Core Architecture:** Dual-view system (desktop interface for teachers and mobile interface for students) utilizing manual JWT authentication in FastAPI.
- **Technical Highlights:**
  - Early-stage implementation of TanStack Table APIs for data grids.
- **Key Challenges Resolved:**
  - Dealt with rendering bottlenecks on the teacher panel by optimizing custom hooks and backend polling frequency.
  - Archived the project after educational policies banned mobile devices in classrooms, utilizing the codebase patterns as a direct foundation for GimTest.
